tools.name: get_churn_cost
tools.description: Calculate the monthly revenue cost of SaaS churn from MRR, churn rate, and customer count. Returns the dollar value leaking out each month.

tools.name: get_ltv
tools.description: Calculate customer lifetime value (LTV) for a SaaS business from ARPU, gross margin, and monthly churn. Uses the canonical David Skok formula.

tools.name: project_revenue
tools.description: Project SaaS revenue 12 months forward from current MRR and a monthly growth assumption. Returns month-by-month MRR.
